productDisplayName: Murcia Women TMK Green Green Handbags
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this black shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or college. The bag is large enough to accomodate all your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get apprecaitive glances all day long. Made of leather for enhanced durability and style Two roomy zippered compartments with inner zippered pocket and small pouch to hold essentials Small zippered compartment at the back for stowing essentials Leather flower appliqued on the front with hanging tassles Contrast thread detailing for added attraction Two padded short handles for ease of carrying and extra comfort Metal loops for the handles with stud detailing for added style Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
